mechanism: One value is treated as the only legitimate moral consideration
possible_dampener: Pluralist value mapping and explicit tradeoff analysis

mechanism: Disagreement is mistaken for anything-goes morality
possible_dampener: Distinguish pluralism from relativism and preserve moral judgment

mechanism: Criticism of a view is experienced as attack on the group
Different communities trust different authorities and evidence standards
possible_dampener: Transparent procedures and shared verification channels

mechanism: The same case is narrated through different moral categories
Dominant values are presented as neutral common sense
possible_dampener: Attention to affected groups and institutional power

mechanism: Pluralist language is used to hide cruelty domination or manipulation
All disagreement is treated as danger or betrayal
possible_dampener: Pluralist institutions and protected lawful contestation
